questions.question: Why is the approval of Otarmeni considered important?
options: It completely cures age-related hearing loss
It demonstrates that gene therapy can restore hearing
It works for every type of deafness
questions.explanation: Otarmeni provides proof that gene therapy can be delivered successfully to the inner ear.

questions.question: What is the goal of the Australian gene therapy project?
questions.explanation: The therapy aims to enhance outcomes for cochlear implant users.

questions.question: Which cells are being studied to regenerate the spiral ganglion?
options: Stem cells called otic neural progenitors
questions.explanation: Researchers hope these stem cells can regenerate damaged auditory neurons.

questions.question: Which diet was associated with reduced risk of hearing loss?
questions.explanation: The article specifically mentions the DASH diet.

questions.question: What is Golub's main recommendation?
options: Wait for gene therapies to become available
Get your hearing tested and seek professional advice
questions.explanation: Golub stresses that people should not ignore hearing loss and should consult an audiologist.
